siteTitle: Nexus Web Tools — Free Online Calculators & Unit Converters (SG)
heroDesc: Nexus Web Tools is a growing hub of fast, free, no-nonsense calculators and utilities. Every tool runs instantly in your browser — no sign-up, no install, mobile-friendly.
introP1: Nexus Web Tools provides a comprehensive suite of free online calculators and unit converters designed for everyday use. Whether you are planning a mortgage, modelling compound interest for retirement, managing a construction project with S-curve analysis, or converting units for work or study, our tools deliver instant, accurate results directly in your browser. There is no need to download software, create an account, or pay subscription fees. Every calculator is mobile-friendly, works offline once loaded, and respects your privacy — no tracking of your inputs.
introP2: Our financial calculators cover the full spectrum of personal finance: compound interest with regular contributions and scenario comparison, mortgage amortisation, loan repayments, savings goals, retirement planning, and investment growth modelling. Each tool includes detailed explanations of the underlying formulas, worked examples, and frequently asked questions so you can understand the maths behind the numbers — not just get a black-box answer.
introP3: For professionals in construction, engineering, and project management, our S-curve modelling tools help you track project progress, forecast cash flow, and compare planned versus actual performance using earned value management principles. The unit converter suite includes over 40 categories spanning length, weight, temperature, speed, area, volume, pressure, energy, power, data, time, angle, frequency, torque, fuel, force, density, flow rate, illuminance, radiation, viscosity, and many common conversion shortcuts.
compoundToolsDesc: Our compound interest calculator suite covers every common financial scenario. Each sub-calculator is pre-configured for its specific use case while sharing the same powerful engine.
scToolsDesc: An S-curve is a graphical representation of cumulative progress over time, widely used in project management, construction, engineering, and financial forecasting.
unitToolsDesc: Our unit converter suite covers over 40 measurement categories with instant, accurate conversions.
cardConcreteDesc: Volume, bags, mix ratios, saw-cut spacing and concrete on graded land. Metric & imperial.
cardCompoundDesc: Future value with regular contributions, any compounding frequency, plus a multi-scenario comparison tool.
cardMortgageDesc: Calculate monthly mortgage repayments, total interest, and amortisation schedules for any home loan.
cardSCurveDesc: Project progress tracking, earned value management, cash flow forecasting, and resource planning with S-curve analysis.
cardUnitDesc: Convert between 40+ unit categories — length, weight, temperature, area, volume, speed, pressure, energy, data, and more.
